title: The Search for Zoro Begins
description: On pages 19–21, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: HE BEAT LADY ALVIDA! HE'S NOT HUMAN!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU MUST HAVE EATEN THE FRUIT OF THE GUM-GUM TREE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But Luffy, if you're going after one piece...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THAT MEANS YOU'LL HAVE TO ENTER THE "GRAND LINE."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They call it the Pirates' graveyard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's why I'm assembling a super crew.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: THAT GUY IMPRISONED AT THE NAVY BASE...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: IF HE'S A GOOD GUY, I'LL LET HIM JOIN MY CREW!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER NEVER! THAT'LL NEVER HAPPEN! THAT GUY'S A DEMONIC BEAST!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: AND SO THE TWO YOUNG ADVENTURERS SAIL ON TOWARDS THE NAVAL BASE AND... DESTINY!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: "The skull and crossbones" - the crossbones are thigh bones.

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
